reviews.comment:
Pedi un lomito tostado en pan árabe,  el lomito no era lomito , duro de masticar wl pan árabe no era árabe de arabia sino de de Río Tala, buena atención del personal,  buenos baños aire acondicionado,  fuera del sandwich todo bien

(Translated by Google)
I ordered a toasted steak sandwich on pita bread. The steak wasn't steak at all; it was hard to chew. The pita bread wasn't from Arabia, but from Río Tala. The staff was attentive, the bathrooms were nice, and there was air conditioning. Aside from the sandwich, everything was fine.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCbDlmbVl3EAE

reviews.comment:
Pasaba siempre que viajaba desde Córdoba a Bs As. Las últimas veces SOLO aceptaban pago en efectivo. Lo único bueno, el restaurante; rápido, rico y variado.

(Translated by Google)
It always happened when I traveled from Córdoba to Buenos Aires. The last few times they ONLY accepted cash. The only good thing was the restaurant; fast, tasty, and with a good selection.
